summary: Backend testing for Distance Calculation (Fahrtkosten) feature. All 10 tests passed (100%). The /api/calculate-distance endpoint correctly uses Nominatim for geocoding and OSRM for routing. Settings fields (company_address, km_rate, hourly_travel_rate) work correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/calculate-distance with to_address returns distance_km, duration_minutes, km_cost, time_cost, total_cost (Berlin->Hamburg: 289.3km, 178min, 220.29€)
POST /api/calculate-distance uses company_address from settings as from_address when not provided (Berlin->Munich verified)
POST /api/calculate-distance returns 400 if no company_address in settings and no from_address provided (German error message)
POST /api/calculate-distance with explicit from_address overrides settings (Frankfurt->Cologne: 190.2km)
POST /api/calculate-distance returns 400 when to_address is missing
Settings endpoint returns company_address, km_rate, hourly_travel_rate fields
Settings endpoint accepts and stores company_address, km_rate, hourly_travel_rate fields (verified persistence)
Distance calculation uses km_rate and hourly_travel_rate from settings (verified with custom rates 0.50€/km, 60€/h)
critical_code_review_comments: Distance calculation endpoint correctly implements the formula: total_cost = (distance_km × km_rate) + (duration_minutes/60 × hourly_travel_rate)
External APIs (Nominatim + OSRM) are working correctly - no mocking needed
Error handling is proper with German error messages for missing addresses
Settings fields for Fahrtkosten (company_address, km_rate, hourly_travel_rate) are properly stored and retrieved
seed_data_creation: Used existing settings: company_address='Berlin, Germany', km_rate=0.30, hourly_travel_rate=45.0
context_for_next_testing_agent: Distance calculation feature fully tested. Key endpoint: POST /api/calculate-distance accepts {to_address, from_address(optional)}. Uses company_address from settings if from_address not provided. Returns {from_address, to_address, distance_km, duration_minutes, km_rate, hourly_rate, km_cost, time_cost, total_cost}. Uses external APIs: Nominatim (geocoding) and OSRM (routing). Settings fields: company_address, km_rate (default 0.30), hourly_travel_rate (default 45.0). Frontend has 'Fahrtkosten berechnen' button in WYSIWYG editor that adds 'Fahrtkostenanteil' position.
